headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://*.supabase.co https://*.googleapis.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://*.supabase.co https://*.googleapis.com; connect-src 'self' https://*.supabase.co wss://*.supabase.co https://*.googleapis.com; frame-src 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'
